title: lithocarpus skanianus
intro: Lithocarpus skanianus, also known as the Skanian nut oak, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to Taiwan and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Skanian nut oak is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. In traditional herbal preparations, Lithocarpus skanianus is often used in teas, capsules, or tinctures to harness its potential medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
